editableFrameAttributes.description:
Attributes for the editable frame[.sun-editor-editable].
```js
{ editableFrameAttributes: { spellcheck: 'true', autocomplete: 'on' } }
```

editorStyle.description:
Style string of the top frame of the editor.
```js
{ editorStyle: 'border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;' }
```

iframe.description: Content will be placed in an iframe and isolated from the rest of the page.

iframe_fullPage.description: Allows the usage of HTML, HEAD, BODY tags and DOCTYPE declaration on the `iframe`.

statusbar_showPathLabel.description: Displays the current node structure in the status bar.

statusbar_resizeEnable.description: Enables resize function of the bottom status bar.

charCounter.description:
Shows the number of characters in the editor.
- If the `maxCharCount` option has a value, it becomes `true`.

charCounter_max.description: The maximum number of characters allowed to be inserted into the editor.

charCounter_label.description:
Text to be displayed in the `charCounter` area of the bottom bar.
```js
{ charCounter_label: 'Characters :' }
```

charCounter_type.description:
Defines the calculation method of the `charCounter` option.
- `char`: Characters length.
- `byte`: Binary data size of characters.
- `byte-html`: Binary data size of the full HTML string.

top.description: Styles applied to the top container (e.g. width, z-index, etc).

frame.description: Styles applied to the iframe container (e.g. height, min-height).

editor.description: Styles applied to the editable content area.

codeMirrorEditor.description: CodeMirror editor instance (frame-level). Set by `_checkCodeMirror` after initialization.

buttonList.description:
List of toolbar buttons, grouped by sub-arrays.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.BUTTON_LIST}

v2Migration.description: Enables migration mode for SunEditor v2.

mode.description: Toolbar mode: `classic`, `inline`, `balloon`, `balloon-always`. Append `:bottom` to place toolbar at the bottom (e.g. `classic:bottom`, `inline:bottom`).

type.description:
Editor type. Use `"document"` for a document-style layout, with optional sub-types after `:`.
```js
// type
'document:header,page'
```

strictMode.description:
Enables strict filtering of tags, attributes, and styles.
- Use `true` to enable all filters (default), or an object to control individual filters.
- Setting `false` is not supported; use the object form to disable specific filters instead.
- :filter description
- `tagFilter`: Filters disallowed HTML tags (`elementWhitelist`/`elementBlacklist`)
- `formatFilter`: Filters format elements (`formatLine`/`formatBlock`)
- `classFilter`: Filters disallowed CSS class names (`allowedClassName`)
- `textStyleTagFilter`: Filters text style tags (b, i, u, span, etc.)
- `attrFilter`: Filters disallowed HTML attributes (`attributeWhitelist`/`attributeBlacklist`)
- `styleFilter`: Filters disallowed inline styles (`spanStyles`/`lineStyles`/`allUsedStyles`)
```js
// disable only attribute and style filters
{
strictMode: {
tagFilter: true,
formatFilter: true,
classFilter: true,
textStyleTagFilter: true,
attrFilter: false,
styleFilter: false
}
}
```

scopeSelectionTags.description:
Tags treated as whole units when selecting all content.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS}

elementWhitelist.description:
Specifies HTML elements to additionally allow beyond the default allow list. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Added to the default list determined by {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultElementWhitelist}.
```js
{ elementWhitelist: 'mark|details|summary' }
```

elementBlacklist.description:
Specifies HTML elements that should not be used. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Tags specified here will eventually be removed, even if they are included in other whitelists.
```js
{ elementBlacklist: 'script|style|iframe' }
```

allowedClassName.description:
Allowed class names.
- Added the default value {@link DEFAULTS.CLASS_NAME}

attributeBlacklist.description:
Specifies attributes to disallow by tag. `"*"` applies to all tags.
- Attributes specified here will eventually be removed even if they are allowed by other settings.
- A list of required elements, {@link DEFAULTS.REQUIRED_FORMAT_LINE}, is always included.
```js
{ attributeBlacklist: { '*': 'onclick|onerror' } }
```

textStyleTags.description:
Additional text style tags.
- The default follows {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__textStyleTags}

allUsedStyles.description:
Specifies additional styles to the list of allowed styles. Delimiter: `"|"`.
```js
{ allUsedStyles: 'color|background-color|text-shadow' }
```

spanStyles.description:
Specifies allowed styles for the `span` tag.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SPAN_STYLES}

lineStyles.description:
Specifies allowed styles for the `line` element (p..).
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.LINE_STYLES}

fontSizeUnits.description:
Allowed font size units.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SIZE_UNITS}

retainStyleMode.description:
Determines how inline elements (e.g. `<span>`, `<strong>`) are handled when deleting text.
- `repeat`: Styles are retained unless backspace is repeatedly pressed.
- Continuous pressing will eventually remove the styles.
- `none`: Styles are not retained. Inline elements are immediately removed with the text.
- `always`: Styles persist indefinitely unless explicitly removed.
- Even if all text inside an inline element is deleted, the element itself remains.

defaultLine.description: Default `line` element when inserting new lines.

defaultLineBreakFormat.description:
Specifies the default line break format. - [Recommended] `line` : Line break is divided into general tags. - [Not recommended] `br` : Line breaks are treated as
on the same line. (like shift+enter) - Line breaks are handled as
within `line`. - You can create a new `line` by entering a line break twice in a row. - Formats that include `line`, such as "Quote", still operate on a `line` basis. - suneditor processes work in `line` units. - When set to `br`, performance may decrease when editing a lot of data.

lineAttrReset.description:
Line properties that should be reset when changing lines. Delimiter: `"|"`.
```js
{ lineAttrReset: 'id|name' }
```

formatLine.description:
Additionally allowed `line` elements beyond the default. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatLine} to form the final `line` list.
- `line` element also contains `brLine` element.
```js
{ formatLine: 'ARTICLE|SECTION' }
```

formatBrLine.description:
Additionally allowed `brLine` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBrLine} to form the final `brLine` list.
- `brLine` elements are included in the `line` element.
- `brLine` elements' line break is `BR` tag.
```js
{ formatBrLine: 'CODE' }
```
- ※ Entering the Enter key on the last line ends `brLine` and appends `line`.

formatClosureBrLine.description:
Additionally allowed `closureBrLine` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBrLine} for the final `closureBrLine` list.
- `closureBrLine` elements are included in the `brLine`.
- `closureBrLine` elements' line break is `BR` tag.
- ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key.
- ※ Use it only in special cases. ([ex] format of table cells)

formatBlock.description:
Additionally allowed `block` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBlock} to form the final `block` list.
- `block` wraps the `line` and `component`.

formatClosureBlock.description:
Additionally allowed `closureBlock` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBlock} for the final `closureBlock` list.
- `closureBlock` elements are included in the `block`.
- `closureBlock` element wraps the `line` and `component`.
- ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key.
- ※ Use it only in special cases. (e.g. format of table cells)

toolbar_sticky.description: Enables sticky toolbar with optional offset.

subToolbar.description: Sub-toolbar configuration. A secondary toolbar that appears on text selection.

statusbar_container.description: Container element for the status bar.

copyFormatKeepOn.description: Keeps the format of the copied content.

autoLinkify.description:
Automatically converts URLs into hyperlinks. (`Link` plugin required)
- Default: `Boolean(plugins.link)` — determined by whether the `link` plugin is enabled.

historyStackDelayTime.description: Delay time for history stack updates (ms).

historyStackSize.description: Maximum number of history entries per root frame. Oldest entries are discarded when exceeded.

fullScreenOffset.description: Offset applied when entering fullscreen mode.

previewTemplate.description: Custom HTML template for preview mode. Use `{{ contents }}` as a placeholder for editor content.

printTemplate.description:
Custom HTML template for print mode. Use `{{ contents }}` as a placeholder for editor content. ```js { previewTemplate: '

Preview

{{ contents }}
' } ```

componentInsertBehavior.description:
Enables automatic selection of inserted components.
- For inline components: places cursor near the component, or selects if no nearby range.
- For block components: executes behavior based on `selectMode`:
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

finder_panel.description:
Shows the built-in Find/Replace panel UI.
- The finder is always created internally; this option controls whether the panel is visible to users (Ctrl+F / Ctrl+H).

finder_liveSearch.description: Searches instantly as you type (debounced). When false, search runs only on Enter.

buttons.description: List of currently used toolbar buttons

buttons_sub.description: List of currently used sub-toolbar buttons

reverseCommands.description:
Merged reverse command pairs array.
- Includes default `indent-outdent` + user's `reverseButtons`.

fileBrowser_data.description: Direct data without server calls (bypasses URL fetch).

fileBrowser_thumbnail.description: Default thumbnail URL or a function that returns a thumbnail URL per item.

codeBlock_langs.description:
List of selectable programming languages for code blocks.
- Defaults to 21 common languages
- [javascript, typescript, html, css, json, python, java, c, cpp, csharp, go, rust, ruby, php, swift, kotlin, sql, bash, markdown, xml, yaml].
- Set to empty array `[]` to disable language selection UI entirely.

exportPDF_apiUrl.description: Server request URL for PDF generation

exportPDF_fileName.description: Name of the generated PDF file

fileUpload_uploadUrl.description: Server request URL for file upload

fileUpload_uploadSizeLimit.description: Total upload size limit in bytes

fileUpload_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: Single file size limit in bytes

fileUpload_as.description: Specify the default form of the file component as `box` or `link`

fileUpload_controls.description: Additional controls to be added to the figure

fileUpload_insertBehavior.description:
Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

blockStyle_items.description:
Format list.
- `command` — `"line"`: single line block, `"br-line"`: br-separated block, `"block"`: container block.

layout_items.description: Layout list. Each item defines a named layout template with raw HTML.

table_colorList.description: HEX color list for the cell background color picker.

mention_triggerText.description: The character that triggers the mention list.

mention_limitSize.description: The number of items to display in the mention list

mention_searchStartLength.description: The number of characters to start searching for the mention list

mention_delayTime.description: The time to wait before displaying the mention list

mention_data.description: Static mention data (used instead of API).

mention_apiUrl.description: The URL to call the mention list

mention_apiHeaders.description: The headers to send with the API call

mention_useCachingData.description: Whether to cache the mention list data

mention_useCachingFieldData.description: Whether to cache the mention list data in the field

fontSize_sizeUnit.description:
The unit for the font size.
- Accepted values include: `'px'`, `'pt'`, `'em'`, `'rem'`, `'vw'`, `'vh'`, `'%'` or `'text'`.
- If `'text'` is used, a text-based font size list is applied.

fontSize_showDefaultSizeLabel.description: Determines whether the default size label is displayed in the dropdown menu.

fontSize_showIncDecControls.description:
When `true`, displays increase and decrease buttons for font size adjustments.
- Defaults to `false`. Always `false` when `sizeUnit` is `'text'` (ignored).

fontSize_disableInput.description:
When `true`, disables the direct font size input box.
- Defaults to `true` when `sizeUnit` is `'text'`, otherwise `false`.

fontSize_unitMap.description: Override or extend the default unit mapping for font sizes.

audio_defaultWidth.description: The default width of the `AUDIO` tag.

audio_defaultHeight.description: The default height of the `AUDIO` tag.

audio_createFileInput.description: Whether to create a file input element.

audio_createUrlInput.description:
Whether to create a URL input element.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.

audio_uploadUrl.description: The URL to which files will be uploaded.

audio_uploadHeaders.description: Headers to include in the file upload request.

audio_uploadSizeLimit.description: The total upload size limit in bytes.

audio_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: The single file size limit in bytes.

audio_allowMultiple.description: Whether to allow multiple file uploads.

audio_audioTagAttributes.description: Additional attributes to set on the `AUDIO` tag.

audio_insertBehavior.description:
Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

drawing_outputFormat.description: The output format of the drawing. Options: `"dataurl"`, `"svg"`.

drawing_useFormatType.description: Whether to enable format type selection (`block` vs `inline`).

drawing_defaultFormatType.description: The default format type, either `"block"` or `"inline"`.

drawing_keepFormatType.description: Whether to maintain the chosen format type after drawing.

drawing_lineWidth.description: The width of the drawing line.

drawing_lineReconnect.description: Whether to reconnect lines when drawing.

drawing_lineCap.description: The style of the line cap (`"butt"`, `"round"`, or `"square"`).

drawing_lineColor.description: The color of the drawing line.

drawing_canResize.description: Whether the modal form can be resized.

drawing_maintainRatio.description: Whether to maintain the aspect ratio when resizing.

drawing_formSize.description: The size configuration for the drawing modal form.

embed_canResize.description: Whether the embed element can be resized.

embed_showHeightInput.description: Whether to display the height input field.

embed_defaultWidth.description: The default width of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).

embed_defaultHeight.description: The default height of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).

embed_percentageOnlySize.description: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.

embed_uploadHeaders.description: Headers to include in file upload requests.

embed_uploadSizeLimit.description: The total file upload size limit in bytes.

embed_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: The single file upload size limit in bytes.

embed_iframeTagAttributes.description: Additional attributes to set on the `IFRAME` tag.

embed_query_youtube.description: YouTube query parameter appended to the embed URL.

embed_query_vimeo.description: Vimeo query parameter appended to the embed URL.

embed_urlPatterns.description: Additional URL patterns to recognize as embeddable content.

embed_insertBehavior.description:
Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

image_canResize.description: Whether the image element can be resized.

image_showHeightInput.description: Whether to display the height input field.

image_defaultWidth.description: The default width of the image. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.

image_defaultHeight.description: The default height of the image. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.

image_percentageOnlySize.description: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.

image_createFileInput.description: Whether to create a file input element for image uploads.

image_createUrlInput.description:
Whether to create a URL input element for image insertion.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.

image_uploadUrl.description: The URL endpoint for image file uploads.

image_uploadHeaders.description: Additional headers to include in the file upload request.

image_uploadSizeLimit.description: The total upload size limit in bytes.

image_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: The single file upload size limit in bytes.

image_allowMultiple.description: Whether multiple image uploads are allowed.

image_acceptedFormats.description: The accepted file formats for image uploads.

image_useFormatType.description: Whether to enable format type selection (`block` or `inline`).

image_defaultFormatType.description: The default image format type (`"block"` or `"inline"`).

image_keepFormatType.description: Whether to retain the chosen format type after image insertion.

image_linkEnableFileUpload.description: Whether to enable file uploads for linked images.

image_insertBehavior.description:
Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- For inline components: places cursor near the component, or selects if no nearby range.
- For block components: executes behavior based on `selectMode`:
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

link_uploadUrl.description: The URL endpoint for file uploads.

link_uploadHeaders.description: Additional headers for file upload requests.

link_uploadSizeLimit.description: The total file upload size limit in bytes.

link_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: The single file upload size limit in bytes.

link_acceptedFormats.description: Accepted file formats for link uploads.

link_openNewWindow.description: Default checked value of the "Open in new window" checkbox.

link_noAutoPrefix.description: If `true`, disables the automatic prefixing of the host URL to the value of the link.

link_relList.description: Available `rel` attribute values shown as checkboxes in the link modal.

math_canResize.description: Whether the math modal can be resized.

math_autoHeight.description: Whether to automatically adjust the height of the modal.

math_fontSizeList.description: A list of font size options for the math expression size selector.

math_onPaste.description: A callback function to handle paste events in the math input area.

math_formSize.description: An object specifying the dimensions for the math modal.

video_canResize.description: Whether the video element can be resized.

video_showHeightInput.description: Whether to display the height input field.

video_defaultWidth.description: The default width of the video element. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.

video_defaultHeight.description: The default height of the video element. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.

video_percentageOnlySize.description: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.

video_createFileInput.description: Whether to create a file input element for video uploads.

video_createUrlInput.description:
Whether to create a URL input element for video embedding.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.

video_uploadUrl.description: The URL endpoint for video file uploads.

video_uploadHeaders.description: Additional headers to include in the video upload request.

video_uploadSizeLimit.description: The total upload size limit for videos in bytes.

video_uploadSingleSizeLimit.description: The single file upload size limit for videos in bytes.

video_allowMultiple.description: Whether multiple video uploads are allowed.

video_acceptedFormats.description: Accepted file formats for video uploads (`"video/*"`).

video_defaultRatio.description: The default aspect ratio for the video (height/width, e.g. 16:9 → `9/16 = 0.5625`).

video_showRatioOption.description: Whether to display the ratio option in the modal.

video_ratioOptions.description: Custom ratio options for video resizing (value = height/width).

video_videoTagAttributes.description: Additional attributes to set on the `VIDEO` tag.

video_iframeTagAttributes.description: Additional attributes to set on the `IFRAME` tag.

video_query_youtube.description: Additional query parameters for YouTube embedding.

video_query_vimeo.description: Additional query parameters for Vimeo embedding.

video_urlPatterns.description: Additional URL patterns for video embedding.

video_extensions.description: Additional file extensions to be recognized for video uploads.

video_insertBehavior.description:
Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.
